headline: This NICE Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Upgrades For Thursday
summary: Wall Street analysts upgraded REXR, NICE, BXP, and EPRT stocks and lowered price targets. Check out other analysts' views. Photo by Shutterstock.

headline: Scotiabank Upgrades BXP to Sector Outperform, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   upgrades BXP (NYSE:BXP) from Sector Perform to Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $65 to $70.
